series_metadata.series_description: File contains application number, owners' name and address, project name and location, contractor name and address, type of system to be installed, substance to be carried in system, operating pressure, approximate starting date, actual cost of installati

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the Ohio Data Network computer system until information is superseded by new information or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain 5 years after release of audit report by Auditor of State, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
